info.title: MeddyNet Backend API
info.description: Unified API Gateway powering MeddyNet's suite of Next.js 16 frontends.

post.description:
Temporary upload for onboarding documents before formal lab_id is created.
Uses a temporary directory structure.

get.description: Check if email or phone is already registered.

post.description: Second step of 2FA login: verify OTP using temp_token and return real auth tokens.
Send a 6-digit OTP to the user's phone to enable 2FA.
Verify the OTP and enable 2FA for the user.
Disable 2FA for the user (requires re-verify via password in frontend).

get.description: Search labs by test name or category.

post.description: Create a new test booking with automated payment initialization.

get.description: Fetch user bookings with enriched data efficiently.

post.description: Allow labs to manually schedule a visit (walk-in or home collection).

get.description: Fetch user bookings with enriched data efficiently.
Get optimized single booking with full joined details.

patch.description: Update booking status. Authorized for Lab Admins, Staff, and assigned Technicians.
Cancel a booking. Only possible if status is pending or confirmed.

post.description: Create a standalone Razorpay order for wallet top-up.

get.description: Fetch all payments for the logged-in user.
Fetch a single payment detail.
Fetch all reports for the logged-in user with enriched lab and test info.
Fetch all reports for the logged-in user with enriched lab and test info.
Get a single report detail.
Fetch user's notifications from MongoDB.

patch.description: Mark a single notification as read.
Mark all user notifications as read.

schema.title: Response Get My Jobs Technician Me Jobs Get

get.description: Lists jobs that are confirmed but not yet assigned to any technician.

schema.title: Response Get Available Jobs Technician Jobs Available Get

get.description: Returns platform-wide KPIs for the Admin Dashboard.
Returns live system logs and health status from MongoDB.
Returns labs that are pending verification with their accreditation docs.
Lists all labs for management.
Lists all users (patients) for management.
Lists all platform-wide bookings with enriched data.
Lists all technicians with profile details.

delete.description: Soft-deletes a user from the system.

get.description: Lists all support tickets on the platform.

post.description: Sends a response to a support ticket and optionally resolves it.

get.description: Returns a list of financial transactions derived from bookings.
Lists all paid payments that haven't been transferred to the lab.

post.description: Triggers bank transfers via Razorpay Route for all pending payments.

get.description:
Lists all diagnostic reports across the platform with real data.
Joined with Booking (patient name) and Lab (lab name).
Returns a chronological stream of administrative actions from MongoDB.

post.description:
Finds duplicate labs by name (case-insensitive) and deactivates them,
keeping only the most recently created one active per unique name.
Also deactivates labs with no associated tests.
Called by a Lab Admin to request a withdrawal of their earnings.
Called by an Admin to execute the actual payout via Razorpay.

get.description:
Performs a deep health check across all infrastructure layers.
Checks: NeonDB (Postgres), MongoDB Atlas, Supabase Storage, and Redis.

post.description:
Submit a review for a lab after a completed booking.
Each patient can only review a given booking once.

get.description:
Public endpoint — fetch reviews for a specific lab.
Returns paginated reviews with average rating summary.
Admin endpoint — list all reviews across the platform.
Public — list all active subscription plans.

post.description: Admin — create a new subscription plan.

get.description: Public — get a specific plan by ID.

patch.description: Admin — update an existing subscription plan.

delete.description: Admin — soft-deactivate a plan (never hard delete — labs may still be on it).

post.description:
Validate a coupon code at checkout.
Returns the discount amount if valid, or a clear error if not.
Does NOT increment used_count — that happens on booking confirmation.

get.description: Admin — list all coupons with optional active filter.

post.description: Admin — create a new coupon code.

patch.description: Admin — activate or deactivate a coupon.

delete.description: Admin — permanently delete a coupon (only if unused).

get.description: Public — list all active service cities.

post.description: Admin — add a new service city.

get.description: Public — get city details by slug.

post.description: Admin — recompute the lab_count cache for a city.
